qa_pairs.question: How do I load GROMACS version 2023.5 for CPU-only execution using the StdEnv/2023 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS version 2023.5 on CPUs with the StdEnv/2023 environment, you need to load the following modules: `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 gromacs/2023.5`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to use GROMACS version 2023.5 with GPU acceleration in the StdEnv/2023 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For GPU-accelerated execution of GROMACS version 2023.5 within the StdEnv/2023 environment, load these modules: `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 cuda/12.2 gromacs/2023.5`.

qa_pairs.question: Which modules are necessary to run GROMACS version 2022.3 on CPUs under the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS version 2022.3 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment, load the modules: `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs/2022.3`.
